finding_results.notes: Replaced the abstract 'shape of the words' construction with a physical acoustics description tied to the river scene.
Removed the opening scar re-inventory and the repeated physical callbacks. The chapter now keeps only one brief functional injury reference in Sable's report.

Corrected Kem's retrospective anchor values to 225 at Spent Towns entry, 183 after the silo fight, 160 after the settlement escape, and 148 now. Sable's report still aligns with the 160->148 post-settlement drop.

Aligned the reflection to three days since Thessa's kitchen and added an explicit first-night-south-of-the-river camp beat so the bridge-day chronology now reads cleanly into Ch12's later post-river marker.
Added a first-night-south-of-the-river camp sequence that puts Kem's new burden of judgment under pressure instead of padding. Revised chapter word count is 5354.

pass_summaries.summary: Resolved all packet findings in chapter 11 by replacing the river-acoustics shape tic, stripping repeated scar description, correcting the Ledger arithmetic, clarifying the Thessa-to-river calendar, and adding a first-night-south-of-the-river camp beat that extends the chapter's engine while raising it above the minimum word count.
